name: Ivara Kelm
physical_description: Tall, ash-pale, and always carrying a lacquered case of maps that smell faintly of metal and sap.
speaking_style: Cultured and patient, treating every conversation as if she is already hearing its ending.
motivation: Complete the opening beneath the watchtower before her rivals can steal or ruin it.
secret: She ordered Elira killed when persuasion failed.

relationships.name: Archivist Serel
relationships.description: Once traded notes with Serel before turning to the Circle.
